author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Extract shared temporary-directory lifecycle helpers for tests

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: test files locally repeat mkdtemp(path.join(os.tmpdir(), prefix)), callback execution, and rm(..., { recursive: true, force: true }) cleanup. Representative helpers are tests/unit/fs-utils.spec.ts:14 withTempDir, tests/unit/search-cache.spec.ts:15 withTempDir, tests/unit/config-command.spec.ts:20 withTempRoot, tests/unit/settings-store.spec.ts:12 withTempRoot, tests/unit/telemetry-runtime.spec.ts:34 withTempGlobalRoot, and tests/unit/telemetry-consent.spec.ts:9 withTempGlobalRoot. This is distinct from pm-ibyi legacy settings fixtures and pm-eltf item factories.

Generic withTempDir and specialized withTempGlobalRoot/withTempRoot helpers live under tests/helpers; affected tests consume them instead of local lifecycle copies; cleanup remains force-recursive and safe; targeted tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'temporary directory withTempDir withTempRoot withTempGlobalRoot lifecycle helper tests' found no active exact item; pm-ibyi covers legacy settings fixture content, not temp-directory lifecycle.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for temp-directory test helpers
